title: hydrocotyle vulgaris var. vulgaris
intro: Hydrocotyle vulgaris var. vulgaris, also known as Pennywort or Common Pennywort, is a perennial plant species in the mint family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in herbal preparations to provide health benefits, including reducing stress, improving cognitive function, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Pennywort include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as a supplement to promote overall well-being.
